# CONSTRUCT with Accept: application/ld+json -> JSON-LD
endpoint: sparql_query
classification: spec-required
match_mode: status-only
description: CONSTRUCT honours Accept: application/ld+json

=== request
GET /sparql?query=CONSTRUCT%20WHERE%20%7B%20%3Fs%20%3Fp%20%3Fo%20%7D
Accept: application/ld+json

=== response
200
Content-Type: application/ld+json
